name: Coventry Coil-O-Matic (Haryana) Limited
summary: Coventry Coil-O-Matic (Haryana) Limited manufactures and supplies cooling solutions, including heat exchangers and radiators, for automotive and industrial applications, operating primarily in India. Their business model focuses on providing quality cooling components to OEMs and aftermarket customers. The company is headquartered in Haryana, India.
